page.title: People
page.description: Manage personnel profiles and face registration status.

table.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or employee code
table.title: Title

editDialog.title: Edit person
editDialog.description: Only fields stored in the persons table can be changed here; face registrations are excluded.
editDialog.employeeCodeHint: Employee code cannot be changed from this screen.
editDialog.title: Title

deleteDialog.singleDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action will delete the person on the backend.
deleteDialog.bulkDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected people? This action will delete data on the backend.

toast.updateSuccessDescription: Personnel record for {name} has been updated.
toast.deleteSingleSuccessDescription: The person has been removed from the system.
toast.deleteBulkSuccessDescription: {count} people have been removed from the system.

fieldErrors.duplicateEmail: This email is already used by another person.
fieldErrors.duplicatePhone: This phone number is already used by another person.

messages.duplicateEmployeeCode: Employee code already exists. Please check again.
messages.duplicateEmail: Email already exists. Please check again.
messages.duplicatePhone: Phone number already exists. Please check again.

validation.invalidPhone: Phone number is invalid. Please enter 8-15 digits and optional +, spaces, dashes, or parentheses.
validation.futureJoinedAt: Joined date cannot be in the future.

create.title: Title
create.profileNotesPlaceholder: Internal notes for this person record
create.selectImageTitle: Select or drag a face image
create.selectImageHint: If you skip the image, the system will only create the person profile.
create.successWithFace: Person created and face registration submitted successfully.
create.processing: Person created. Processing the face registration image...
create.processingDescription: The image has been sent to the pipeline and AI service for processing.
create.processingCompletedDescription: The face registration has finished processing and is ready to use.
create.saveSuccessDescription: The personnel profile has been saved successfully.
create.personCreatedRegistrationFailed: The person was created, but face registration failed. Open the profile or use Add face to try again.
create.invalidImageType: Please choose a JPG or PNG file for the face registration image.
create.registrationFailedAfterProcessing: Face registration failed after the system processed the image.
create.processingTimeout: The system took too long to process. The person was created, but face registration is not complete yet.

addFace.selectedPersonDescription: The URL already contains the person id, so you do not need to search again.
addFace.title: Title
addFace.registrationCardDescription: Upload an image to media assets, then create a face registration for this person.
addFace.selectImageHint: JPG or PNG, one person, clear face, good lighting.
addFace.flowHint: The system uploads the image first, then creates a registration from the returned media asset.
addFace.invalidImageDescription: Please choose a JPG or PNG file.
addFace.missingImageDescription: Please choose a JPG or PNG image before submitting.
addFace.processingDescription: The image has been sent to the pipeline and AI service for processing.
addFace.successDescription: The image has been processed successfully and is ready to use.
addFace.failedDescription: Unable to create a face registration. Please try again.
addFace.registrationFailedAfterProcessing: Face registration failed after the system processed the image.
addFace.processingTimeout: The system took too long to process. Face registration is not complete yet.
addFace.multipleFacesDetected: The image contains multiple faces. Please choose an image with only one person.
addFace.noFaceDetected: No face was detected in the image. Please choose a clearer face image.
addFace.faceTooSmall: The face in the image is too small. Please choose a closer image.
addFace.blurredImage: The image is blurry. Please choose a sharper image.
addFace.lowLightImage: The image is too dark. Please choose a brighter image.
addFace.spoofSuspected: The system suspects the uploaded image is not a valid live face.
addFace.embeddingFailed: The system could not generate a face embedding from the uploaded image.
addFace.imageTooLarge: The uploaded image is too large.
addFace.personNotFound: The selected person was not found for face registration.
addFace.registrationNotFound: The face registration record was not found.
addFace.missingBucket: The image storage bucket is missing.
